{"response": "Thank you for bringing this serious issue to our attention. We are committed to resolving it promptly and fairly.

**Immediate actions we will take**
1. **Duty refund request** – We will file a CBSA amendment on your behalf to recover the $126.86 import duty that was incorrectly applied to the webcam. This process may take 4–6 weeks; we will keep you updated with status emails.
2. **Replacement shipment** – Because SKU AI‑PRO‑800 is currently out of stock in our US warehouse, we will ship a new unit from our Canadian distribution center at no additional cost. The replacement will be sent via express shipping and should arrive within 48 hours to meet your recording deadline.
3. **Prepaid return label** – We will email you a prepaid Canada Post return label that includes all required customs paperwork. You can drop the package off at any Canada Post location without incurring any fees or additional documentation on your part.
4. **Tracking & confirmation** – Once the replacement is dispatched, we will send you a tracking number and a confirmation of the duty refund request.

**What you need to do**
- Keep the webcam in its original packaging until you receive the return label.
- Print the prepaid label (sent via email) and attach it to the package.
- Drop the package off at any Canada Post location; no customs paperwork is required from you.

We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please reply to this email or call our Canadian support line at 1‑800‑123‑4567.

Best regards,

Thank you for reaching out about this issue. I’m sorry to hear that you received the wrong item and have incurred additional costs.

**What we will do next**
1. **Immediate refund of duties** – We will submit a CBSA amendment request on your behalf to recover the $126.86 import duty that was incorrectly applied to the webcam. This process can take up to 4–6 weeks, but we’ll keep you updated.
2. **Replacement of the audio interface** – Because the SKU AI‑PRO‑800 is currently out of stock in our US warehouse, we will ship a new unit from our Canadian distribution center at no additional cost to you. The replacement will be expedited (express shipping) so it arrives within 48 hours.
3. **Return of the incorrect item** – We will provide you with a prepaid return label that covers all customs paperwork and freight. You can drop the package off at any Canada Post location; there is no charge to you for returning the webcam.
4. **Confirmation & tracking** – Once the replacement has shipped, we’ll send you an email with the tracking number and a confirmation of the duty refund request.

**What you need to do**
- Keep the webcam in its original packaging until you receive the return label.
- Print the prepaid label (we will email it) and attach it to the package.
- Drop the package off at any Canada Post location; no customs paperwork is required on your end.

We appreciate your patience and are committed to resolving this as quickly as possible. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please reply to this email or call our Canadian support line at 1‑800‑123‑4567.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
